title: 1. Jie (88.28) 针解穴
text:
Qi and blood disorder occurs as a result of improper ways of practicing QiGong, or improper ways of
acupuncture by using too many needles, or from traumatic injuries. Jie is quite effective for all these cases, and
also for pains and numbness that occur after acupuncture treatment. The mechanism for this is already explained
in the previous section "Fainting during Acupuncture"
